commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the Telegram webhook shutdown `deleteWebhook` call and updates the shutdown test to expect webhook registration to persist on abort.

PR surface: Source -7, Tests -1. Total -8 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main still calls `deleteWebhook` when the webhook abort signal fires, and the linked report supplies repeated `getWebhookInfo` clearing evidence; I did not run a live Telegram reproduction.
